sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 425 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 16.04.2026 Matter is pending since 2022 and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Diary denotes that applicant has made no effort to have the matter listed or heard for past four years. Today applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
